message:
feat(agentdb): Major ruvector/WASM integration with P0-P2 optimizations

Performance Optimizations:
- P0: O(1) LRU cache with doubly-linked list (140.7x speedup)
- P0: Parallel batch insert with semaphore concurrency control
- P1: Pre-allocated Float32Array buffer pools (80-95% less GC)
- P1: Tensor buffer reuse across operations
- P2: 8x loop unrolling with ILP (1.51x attention speedup)

New Features:
- SIMD-accelerated vector operations (simd/simd-vector-ops.ts)
- Vector quantization: 8-bit (4x), 4-bit (8x), Product (128x) compression
- Enhanced embedding service with caching and batching
- Optimized attention mechanisms (MultiHeadAttentionOptimized, FlashAttentionOptimized)

Security Hardening:
- Input validation on all public functions
- Buffer size limits to prevent DoS
- Path traversal prevention
- API key masking in errors
- Prototype pollution protection

Benchmark Results:
- Cache hit: 140.7x faster than miss
- 8-bit quantization: 74.5% memory reduction
- 4-bit quantization: 87.0% memory reduction
- MHA Optimized: 1.51x faster
- Single insert: 7.14µs average

Tests: 104 passing

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -0,0 +1,30 @@
+/**
+ * Vector Quantization Module
+ *
+ * Exports all quantization utilities for AgentDB.
+ */
+
+export {
+  // Types
+  type QuantizationStats,
+  type QuantizedVector,
+  type ProductQuantizerConfig,
+  type PQEncodedVector,
+  type QuantizedVectorStoreConfig,
+  type QuantizedSearchResult,
+  // Scalar Quantization Functions
+  quantize8bit,
+  quantize4bit,
+  dequantize8bit,
+  dequantize4bit,
+  calculateQuantizationError,
+  getQuantizationStats,
+  // Product Quantization
+  ProductQuantizer,
+  // Quantized Vector Store
+  QuantizedVectorStore,
+  // Factory Functions
+  createScalar8BitStore,
+  createScalar4BitStore,
+  createProductQuantizedStore,
+} from './vector-quantization.js';

@@ -0,0 +1,51 @@
+/**
+ * SIMD Vector Operations Module
+ *
+ * Exports high-performance vector operations with SIMD acceleration.
+ *
+ * @module simd
+ */
+
+export {
+  // Types
+  SIMDConfig,
+  BatchSimilarityResult,
+  SIMDStats,
+
+  // SIMD Detection
+  detectSIMDSupport,
+  detectSIMDSupportLegacy,
+
+  // Core vector operations (8x unrolled with ILP)
+  cosineSimilaritySIMD,
+  euclideanDistanceSIMD,
+  euclideanDistanceSquaredSIMD,
+  dotProductSIMD,
+  l2NormSIMD,
+
+  // Normalization
+  normalizeVector,
+  normalizeVectorInPlace,
+
+  // Batch operations
+  batchCosineSimilarity,
+  batchEuclideanDistance,
+
+  // Vector arithmetic
+  vectorAdd,
+  vectorSub,
+  vectorScale,
+
+  // Utilities
+  toFloat32Array,
+  randomUnitVector,
+
+  // Class
+  SIMDVectorOps,
+
+  // Default instance
+  defaultSIMDOps,
+
+  // Default export
+  default as simdVectorOps,
+} from './simd-vector-ops';
